scriptText:
I. #1

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a UGC-style video hook for @actor as MARK, a high-energy content creator demonstrating a "clone effect" tutorial, transitioning from a friendly direct-to-camera intro to a chaotic visual effect showcase, ending with a cliffhanger for part two.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain a crisp UGC aesthetic with a static or slightly handheld camera to preserve the creator vibe. Ensure the actor's eyeline remains locked to the lens during the intro and the final cliffhanger. Use jump-cuts to facilitate the sudden appearance of clones, ensuring all clones share the exact same wardrobe and styling as the lead. Preserve spatial logic by placing clones in distinct zones (foreground, background, midground) to avoid visual overlap.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Visual Style: Modern UGC / Social Media Creator. High-contrast, clean, and punchy.
Lighting: Key light (softbox) camera-left providing soft shadows; a cool blue LED fill from camera-right; a warm practical lamp in the deep background for depth.
Color Palette: Teal and Orange. Vibrant blues in the wardrobe and background LEDs contrasted with warm, healthy skin tones.
Wardrobe: Casual streetwear: Messy styled dark hair, light facial stubble. An oversized vintage-wash blue hoodie, relaxed-fit black cargo joggers, and white chunky platform sneakers.
Environment Detail: A modern "creator bedroom" or studio. RGB LED strips line the back wall, a gaming monitor glows on a desk to the left, and various pop-culture posters are partially visible.
Camera Motion: Mostly locked-off for the UGC feel, with a slight punch-in (digital zoom) for emphasis during the reveal.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
First Frame: MCU of MARK, dead center, leaning slightly toward the lens with a playful, inviting smirk. The blue hoodie is vibrant against the dim, LED-lit background. Soft key light hits his face from the left, while a sliver of blue rim light defines his right shoulder. He is completely alone in the frame.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] LOCKOFF MCU [AXIS] Center frame -> [BLOCK] MARK occupies center, leaning in -> [ACT] MARK speaks directly to the lens with a conspiratorial whisper: "Wanna know how to fill a room with just yourself?" -> [AUDIO] his voice is clear, upbeat background lo-fi beat begins
[CAM] MS [AXIS] Center-right [STATE IN] leaning in -> [BLOCK] jump-cut: MARK is now standing further back, center-right, leaving a large void camera-left -> [ACT] MARK snaps his fingers sharply toward the empty space -> [STATE OUT] his body is angled toward the void -> [VFX] instantly, a clone of MARK appears camera-left, slumped on a beanbag, looking at a phone
[CAM] WS [AXIS] Wide [STATE IN] two MARKs visible -> [BLOCK] the frame widens to reveal the full room -> [ACT] the lead MARK (center-right) looks around as two more clones pop into existence: one sitting on the edge of the bed (background) and another leaning against the desk (far-left) -> [VFX] the clones are all performing different idle tasks (checking nails, stretching, staring at the ceiling) -> [AUDIO] subtle digital "pop" sounds for each appearance
[CAM] MCU [AXIS] Center [STATE IN] four MARKs in room -> [BLOCK] jump-cut back to the lead MARK, tight on his face -> [ACT] he looks back at the chaos behind him, then locks eyes with the camera, grinning -> [STATE OUT] the grin turns into a mysterious smirk -> [VO] MARK (V.O.): "It's all about the framing... but you'll have to wait for part two to see how." -> [TRANS] hard cut on his smirk.
[</BRIEF>]

II. #2

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a high-energy UGC comedy hook featuring @actor as MARK, a charismatic creator whose dynamic movement triggers a sudden comic book freeze-frame effect.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure a direct-to-camera wide-angle perspective to maintain the authentic UGC feel; prioritize a sharp, instantaneous transition from live-action to the freeze-frame; keep the VFX style consistent with bold comic book aesthetics including outlines and halftone patterns.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Wardrobe: Vintage teal and orange color-block track jacket over a black graphic tee with messy styled hair.
Lighting: Bright, high-key lighting with a subtle cyan rim light for depth.
VFX: Bold black outlines, halftone dot background, radiating speed lines, and a stylized "WHAM!" text.
Palette: High-saturation primaries (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Sound: Energetic lo-fi beat, crisp dialogue, and a heavy "BOOM" SFX.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, WIDE-ANGLE, MARK centered looking directly into the lens with a playful grin, bright studio lighting against a clean background, wearing a vintage color-block windbreaker.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, WIDE-ANGLE, handheld -> [ACT] MARK leans in with high energy, eyes wide and enthusiastic, saying "You gotta see this! Ready?" -> [AUDIO] upbeat lo-fi track starts
[CAM] MCU, WIDE-ANGLE, handheld -> [ACT] MARK jumps slightly and throws a dynamic punch toward camera-left with his right arm, mouth open in a shout -> [SFX] fast whoosh sound
[CAM] LOCKOFF, WIDE-ANGLE -> [ACT] The frame FREEZES at the peak of the punch; bold black outlines appear around MARK, halftone dots fill the background, and a "WHAM!" text pops up in stylized font -> [VFX] comic book freeze-frame transformation with speed lines
[CAM] LOCKOFF, WIDE-ANGLE -> [ACT] MARK (still in freeze-frame) winks and points his left hand toward the corner where "Part 2" text appears -> [VO] "How did I do it? Find out in Part 2!"
[</BRIEF>]

III. #3

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a high-energy, comedic UGC-style video featuring @actor as MARK, a charismatic digital artist demonstrating a "Day-to-Night" visual effects transformation.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize a seamless "snap" transition where MARK’s physical position and the camera’s focal length remain identical across the lighting shift. Ensure background elements like street lamps and windows activate precisely as the sky darkens. Maintain the handheld, organic jitter of a smartphone-shot vlog while using professional-grade cinematic color science.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Style: Energetic UGC / Digital Creator Vlog
Lighting: Flat, bright midday sun -> Dramatic "teal and orange" cinematic night
Palette: Vibrant midday greens/blues -> Deep indigo, electric amber, and neon pops
Wardrobe: Vintage 1970s geometric-patterned button-down shirt in mustard and teal, gold-rimmed glasses
Location: A suburban street corner with visible street lamps and a house in the background
Props: MARK holds a small, vintage analog camera in his left hand as a "relic" prop
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MCU, eye-level, slightly shaky handheld stability -> [BLOCK] MARK stands center-frame on a sun-lit sidewalk, looking directly into the lens with a wide, infectious grin, holding a vintage camera in his left hand.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, handheld -> [ACT] MARK points his right index finger toward the sky and shouts, "You think this vibe is permanent? Watch the sun quit its job!" -> [AUDIO] Ambient city birds, traffic, high-energy voice
[CAM] MCU, PUSH IN slightly -> [ACT] MARK snaps his right fingers toward the camera lens -> [VFX] A digital "ripple" radiates from his fingers; the bright blue sky instantly collapses into a deep indigo twilight -> [AUDIO] Deep bass "thud" with a magical chime
[CAM] MCU, handheld -> [BLOCK] MARK remains in the same center-frame position, now drenched in cool blue moonlight with a warm amber glow hitting his left cheek -> [ACT] He gestures with his vintage camera to the background -> [VFX] Street lamps flicker and "pop" on, storefront windows behind him glow with warm interior light
[CAM] MCU, handheld -> [ACT] MARK leans in closer to the lens, his expression turning mock-serious and secretive, eyes wide with excitement -> [AUDIO] "The lighting curve on this is actually insane... but I'm out of time."
[CAM] MCU, handheld -> [ACT] MARK winks and points to the bottom of the frame, backing away slowly while the camera continues to shake organically -> [AUDIO] "If you want the secret sauce for these shadows, you better check part two!"
[CAM] MCU, handheld -> [ACT] MARK waves his right hand in front of the lens, partially obscuring the view as he laughs, ending on a close-up of his patterned sleeve -> [AUDIO] Upbeat lo-fi hip-hop track swells and cuts abruptly.
[</BRIEF>]

IV. #4

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic UGC-style teaser featuring @actor as MARK, an energetic VFX creator demonstrating a "Super Speed" effect, blending handheld social media energy with high-end superhero visual effects.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure the opening frame feels like a high-quality social media "hook" with direct-to-camera address. Maintain spatial continuity as MARK moves from the foreground to the background. Prioritize the transition from realistic UGC footage to stylized VFX speed lines and motion blur. Preserve MARK’s enthusiastic facial performance and the physical "snap" of the movement. Avoid any fades to black; end on a sharp, motivated cut.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Visual Style: High-contrast UGC meets Cinematic Superhero.
- Lighting: Key light from the side for dramatic facial contours; back-light for hair separation; warm practical lights in the background.
- Color Palette: Deep teals, vibrant oranges, and neon accents.
- Wardrobe: Unique, colorful vintage-style racing jacket with patches over a loud patterned shirt.
- Environment: A cluttered, creative workshop with retro monitors and tangled cables.
- Camera: Wide-angle lens for the hook, switching to a dynamic tracking shot for the speed effect.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, wide-angle lens, MARK frame-center, slightly distorted at the edges. He wears a colorful vintage racing jacket with various patches and a loud orange-patterned shirt. His hair is slightly tousled. He leans toward the camera with a wide, enthusiastic grin. The background is a dimly lit workshop with glowing monitors and cables. [LIGHTING] Strong side-light on his face, neon glow behind him.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, WIDE-ANGLE -> [ACT] MARK points at the camera, eyes bright with energy -> [DIALOGUE] "You think that was fast? Watch this." -> [AUDIO] Ambient workshop hum, distant electronic beep.
[CAM] MS, LOCKED-OFF -> [BLOCK] MARK steps back three paces into the midground, center-frame, and drops into a low athletic crouch. His hands grip his knees. -> [ACT] MARK’s expression shifts from a grin to focused intensity. -> [AUDIO] Sharp intake of breath, low-frequency hum rises.
[CAM] WS, WHIP-PAN R -> [ACT] MARK launches forward, his body becoming a blur of neon-streaked motion lines and white lightning. -> [VFX] Heavy radial blur and chromatic aberration as he vanishes from the midground and reappears instantly in the deep background frame-right. -> [AUDIO] High-pitched "shhh-THWIP" speed sound.
[CAM] MS, LOW-ANGLE -> [ACT] MARK lands frame-right in the background, upright and stable. He brushes a stray hair from his forehead with his left hand. -> [AUDIO] Debris and small sparks settle on the floor behind him.
[CAM] MCU, PUSH-IN -> [ACT] MARK walks back toward the camera, stopping just in front of the lens. He smirks, leans in close, and taps the camera lens. -> [DIALOGUE] "Want to see the breakdown? Part two." -> [AUDIO] Sharp digital "click" on the lens tap.
[</BRIEF>]

V. #5

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a UGC-style cinematic hook for social media featuring @actor as MARK, an energetic VFX creator, transitioning from a high-energy pitch to a gravity-defying levitation showcase.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain UGC-style direct address with handheld movement and authentic enthusiasm. Ensure a seamless spatial transition from a grounded talking head to a zero-gravity state. Preserve the studio geography during the camera orbit. Track the upward drift of wardrobe elements and floating props to reinforce the low-gravity environment.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Medium: Digital UGC
- Palette: Deep charcoal, electric teal accents, warm skin tones.
- Lighting: High-contrast dramatic key, cool teal rim, soft ambient fill.
- Wardrobe: Black tech-wear hoodie with reflective piping, dark joggers, white sneakers.
- Environment: Minimalist modern studio, dark grey walls, floating tech and lifestyle props.
- Anchors: Floating laptop, hardcover books, a coffee mug, MARK as the central pivot.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MARK is framed in a tight MCU, handheld, leaning directly into the lens with a bright, eager expression. The room is dark, lit by a sharp key from camera-left and a teal glow emanating from a monitor in the background.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, eye-level -> [ACT] MARK speaks rapidly with high energy, gesturing slightly as he invites the audience to learn VFX -> [AUDIO] crisp dialogue, upbeat lo-fi background track
[CAM] Whip PAN right with motion blur -> [TRANS] match-cut on movement -> [CAM] MS, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] MARK is now suspended mid-air in a cross-legged meditation pose, his hair and hoodie strings drifting upward -> [AUDIO] upbeat track cuts to a low-frequency hum
[CAM] ORBIT 180 degrees LEFT around the subject -> [ACT] MARK maintains the levitation pose, a subtle smirk on his face as he opens his eyes to look directly at the camera -> [VFX] books, a laptop, and a mug float weightlessly in the midground and foreground -> [AUDIO] wind chime SFX
[CAM] CU, PUSH IN, eye-level -> [ACT] MARK breaks the pose slightly, pointing a finger toward the top of the frame -> [VFX] glowing "Part 2" text materializes in the air -> [AUDIO] "Want to see how it's done? Check Part 2!"
[</BRIEF>]

VI. #6

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a high-energy UGC comedy showcase featuring @actor as MARK, a charismatic and eccentric digital artist.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize rigid spatial tracking for all 3D text assets to ensure they remain anchored to the floor geometry. Maintain consistent shadow orientation on the concrete floor to match the overhead studio lighting. Ensure MARK’s hands realistically "collide" with the text surfaces without clipping.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Style: Polished UGC/Vlog with cinematic high-contrast lighting.
Palette: Industrial loft grays punctuated by neon magenta rim lights and vibrant wardrobe.
Wardrobe: Vintage 90s color-blocked windbreaker (teal, violet, and orange) over a white tee.
Environment: A spacious modern loft with exposed brick and large windows; professional ring light reflected in eyes.
Props: Massive, physical-looking 3D block letters spelling "TRACK" floating at waist height.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, handheld with a slight organic jitter. MARK stands frame-center, grinning enthusiastically. To his left, a giant 3D-rendered yellow word "TRACK" floats in mid-air, casting a sharp, grounded shadow on the polished floor behind him.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, Handheld -> [ACT] MARK leans his right elbow heavily onto the floating 3D letter "T," which realistically dips slightly under his weight -> [AUDIO] "Look at the stability on this thing!"
[CAM] MS, Low Angle, Tracking MARK -> [BLOCK] MARK walks behind the letters "R" and "A" -> [ACT] He peers through the hole of the 3D "A" toward the lens, eyebrows raised in excitement -> [VFX] Text occludes MARK perfectly as he passes behind.
[CAM] CU, Handheld -> [ACT] MARK looks directly into the lens, his expression turning mock-serious and intense -> [AUDIO] "You think this is a green screen? Watch."
[CAM] WS, Stabilized -> [BLOCK] MARK stands frame-right -> [ACT] He suddenly kicks the 3D "K" with his foot; the entire word "TRACK" slides across the concrete floor with a heavy metallic friction sound -> [VFX] Sparks fly from the base of the letters as they scrape the floor.
[CAM] MCU, Handheld -> [ACT] MARK leans in close to the lens, pointing a finger at the viewer with a knowing smirk -> [AUDIO] "Stick around for Part 2—things are about to get weird." -> [ENV] Background neon lights flicker once.
[</BRIEF>]

VII. #7

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a UGC-style cinematic short featuring @actor as MARK, an energetic VFX artist, who directly addresses the camera to showcase a rapid-fire series of elemental powers, ending on a high-impact cliffhanger.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain a 180-degree axis while MARK engages the lens. Track hand-to-hand prop transfers for the metallic prism trigger. Synchronize energetic dialogue with VFX beats for authentic UGC pacing. Ensure interactive lighting from effects persists across shots. Preserve wardrobe and background anchors throughout the rapid-fire sequence.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: Gritty UGC digital with high-end VFX overlays.
Palette: Deep indigo background, burnt orange fire, emerald water, and stark white lightning.
Lighting: High-drama rim light plus interactive flicker from the elemental effects.
Location: Industrial studio with blurred blue LED accents and dark pipes.
Wardrobe: Vintage emerald patterned shirt, maroon velvet vest, and dark trousers.
Prop: Metallic prism used as the catalyst for all effects.
Style: Energetic, handheld, and direct-to-audience.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, handheld, center-framed -> [ACT] MARK holds a metallic prism in his right hand at chest level, looking directly into the lens with an enthusiastic grin, wearing an emerald patterned shirt under a maroon velvet vest -> [ENV] Dimly lit industrial studio with soft blue LED backlighting.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] Handheld MCU -> [ACT] MARK leans in slightly, "You think this is just a prop?" -> [VFX] Micro-sparks dance around the prism in his right hand.
[CAM] Handheld MS -> [ACT] MARK thrusts his right hand forward toward the lens, shouting "Check this!" -> [VFX] A concentrated blast of flame erupts, orange light flickering across his face and the studio wall.
[CAM] Tight CU on hands -> [ACT] He switches the prism to his left hand and snaps his right fingers -> [VFX] Lightning arcs between his fingertips, casting sharp, staccato shadows across the room.
[CAM] Handheld MCU -> [ACT] MARK pulls the prism back to his chest, "And it gets better..." -> [VFX] A spiral of emerald water erupts from the prism, circling his arm with glowing highlights.
[CAM] Handheld CU -> [ACT] MARK smirks, "Part two drops soon." -> [VFX] The fire, lightning, and water merge into a brilliant white prism flare that washes over the frame.
[</BRIEF>]

VIII. #8

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a UGC-style  video featuring @actor as MARK, an energetic VFX content creator showcasing a danger awareness effect to camera — hook, visual demonstration, and part 2 teaser.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain UGC pacing: direct-to-camera address cuts cleanly into the VFX showcase without breaking spatial logic. Preserve MARK's screen position when the effect activates — head snaps up from phone without repositioning his body. Keep the shockwave anchored to his temples and track concentric rings radiating outward in correct 3D space. Ensure the background desaturation reads as an environmental state change, not a camera filter. Rack focus behind him must reveal the danger on the same axis he already occupies. The final dodge keeps his body in frame and ends on eye contact with lens for the teaser.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Look: UGC handheld energy, cinematic base with speed ramp during effect
- Lighting: motivated daylight key from camera-left, subtle warm practical fill from behind, cool ambient for the desaturated danger-state shift
- Palette: warm skin tones and vintage wardrobe in burnt orange and cream; desaturated danger-state shifts to steel blue-grey
- Wardrobe: vintage burnt-orange corduroy overshirt over cream graphic tee, relaxed fit, slightly worn collar for texture
- Styling: natural hair with slight tousle, light stubble, no heavy makeup — authentic creator look
- Environment: cluttered creative workspace — monitor glow, figurines, LED strip, bookshelf with mismatched spines
- VFX: concentric ring shockwave from temples, radial blur pulse, world desaturation, rack focus to falling bookshelf object behind him
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, handheld, camera-right of axis, MARK mid-sentence looking directly into lens with an animated grin, phone held casually in left hand at chest level, burnt-orange corduroy overshirt open over cream graphic tee, warm key light from camera-left casting soft shadow right, cluttered creative workspace visible behind him — monitor, figurines, warm LED glow.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, camera-right of axis -> [ACT] MARK looks directly into lens, grins, gestures with his free right hand and speaks energetically: "You ever get that feeling something's about to happen —" -> [AUDIO] natural room tone, faint monitor hum
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, maintains position -> [ACT] he glances down at phone in left hand, brow flickers, then his head snaps up sharp — concentric ring shockwaves pulse outward from his temples in slow motion -> [VFX] glowing concentric rings radiate from temples, radial blur pulse, background begins desaturating to steel blue-grey
[CAM] MS, slight DOLLY BACK, reveals more of workspace -> [ACT] world shifts into hyper-focused desaturated state, MARK's skin and wardrobe remain warm against the cold environment, rack focus pulls to a heavy object falling from shelf behind him frame-left -> [VFX] full desaturation on environment, MARK stays warm-toned, shallow rack focus reveals falling object
[CAM] MS, HANDHELD, holds position -> [ACT] MARK dodges effortlessly to frame-right without looking, still holding phone in left hand, object crashes behind him, he turns back to camera with a knowing smirk: "Part two drops soon — you do NOT wanna miss it" -> [AUDIO] crash SFX, beat of silence, then his voice clear and close
[</BRIEF>]

IX. #9

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic UGC social media promo featuring @actor as MARK, an eccentric digital alchemist and VFX creator. 
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain constant eye contact between MARK and the lens to preserve the UGC connection. Ensure the background distortion remains mathematically centered on MARK's feet to keep the "Tiny Planet" geometry stable. Prioritize a seamless match-on-action as the horizon line curves upward into a sphere.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Style: High-energy UGC / Surreal Comedy
- Lighting: High-contrast "Golden Hour" drama with long, sharp shadows
- Palette: 90s Retro-Vibrant (Teal, Electric Purple, and Mustard Yellow)
- Wardrobe: Oversized vintage color-block windbreaker, high-waisted corduroy trousers, and retro circular-frame glasses
- Location: A busy, wide-open urban plaza with a clear 360-degree horizon
- Camera: Wide-angle 14mm lens, handheld "selfie-stick" motion logic
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
A high-energy wide shot in a sunny urban plaza. MARK stands center-frame, holding the camera at arm's length, grinning broadly with intense enthusiasm. The background shows a normal, flat city street stretching into the distance.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] WS, handheld selfie-style -> [ACT] MARK leans into the lens, his face fills the frame as he speaks with rapid-fire energy -> [AUDIO] "Stop scrolling! You think space-time is a straight line? Look at this!"
[CAM] PULL BACK rapidly into an ultra-wide fisheye -> [BLOCK] The horizon behind MARK begins to warp and curve upward at the edges -> [VFX] The city buildings bend toward the center of the frame, creating a spherical distortion.
[CAM] ORBITING LOW-ANGLE -> [BLOCK] The ground curves into a small, floating sphere; MARK is now standing on top of a miniature "Tiny Planet" made of the street and buildings -> [ACT] He balances playfully on the peak of the globe, arms outstretched -> [AUDIO] High-pitched wind-whistle and magical shimmering SFX.
[CAM] SLOW ORBIT -> [STATE IN] MARK remains standing on the very top of the sphere -> [ACT] He points directly at the lens, winking as the tiny world continues to rotate beneath his vintage sneakers -> [VFX] Miniature cars and tiny trees wrap around the bottom of the globe.
[CAM] MCU, PUSH IN on MARK’s face -> [ACT] He pulls the camera back to a normal perspective as the world begins to flatten again, but stops halfway -> [AUDIO] "Curious how I warped the world? Check out Part 2 for the breakdown!" -> [ENV] Sunlight glints off his glasses.
[CAM] LOCKOFF, FS -> [ACT] MARK maintains his energetic pose, pointing off-screen toward the "Part 2" button as the video loops -> [AUDIO] Upbeat, glitch-hop music swell.
[</BRIEF>]

X. #10

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a Comedy UGC-style social media video featuring @actor as MARK, a high-energy digital creator.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain a handheld, vlog-style aesthetic while prioritizing realistic facial mesh-warping. Ensure the background anchors remain static to highlight the fluid distortion of the face. Keep eye contact with the lens until the features physically slide out of alignment. Avoid any fade-to-black transitions.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Style: High-energy UGC / Digital Surrealism.
Visual Style: Sharp 4K digital, high-contrast, mimicking a high-end smartphone vlog look.
Lighting: Dramatic high-contrast ring light reflected in eyes; neon purple and amber RGB rim lighting.
Color Palette: Neon teal, electric purple, and vibrant amber against a neutral studio backdrop.
Wardrobe: Oversized 1990s vintage windbreaker in geometric patterns of teal and magenta; chunky clear-frame glasses.
Environment: Creative home studio; background features a blurred shelf of retro cameras and glowing PC hardware.
VFX Mood: Visceral "liquid wax" face melt; features should swirl and drip with organic fluidity.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, Handheld. MARK is centered, leaning close to the camera lens with a wide, enthusiastic grin. He is wearing a colorful vintage windbreaker. The lighting is bright and punchy, with clear ring-light circles visible in his pupils.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] Handheld MCU, slight shaky-cam -> [ACT] MARK gestures excitedly with his right hand toward his face -> [AUDIO] (MARK) "Check out this organic liquify effect I've been refining!"
[CAM] Push in slightly to CU -> [ACT] He holds a freeze-frame pose; his left eye begins to slide slowly down his cheek like melting wax -> [VFX] Realistic skin texture warping and stretching downward.
[CAM] Static CU -> [ACT] MARK tries to keep talking, but his mouth elongates into a drooping swirl; he looks at the camera with a mix of forced enthusiasm and growing confusion -> [VFX] Mouth and jawline liquefying into colorful drips that hover mid-air.
[CAM] Slight tilt-up -> [ACT] His entire facial structure begins to swirl in a centrifugal motion, eyes and nose rotating around the center of his face -> [AUDIO] (MARK, garbled) "Is it... is it working? It feels a bit cold."
[CAM] MCU, pull back slightly -> [ACT] His face remains a swirling puddle of features; he points a finger at the lens, his hand also beginning to warp slightly -> [AUDIO] (MARK) "If you want the breakdown, catch the secret in Part 2!"
[CAM] Handheld jitter -> [ACT] MARK waves a distorted, rubbery hand at the camera as the face-melt reaches its peak, features completely misplaced but his expression still reads as "happy" -> [ENV] Neon background lights flicker in sync with his wave.
[</BRIEF>]

XI. #11

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic UGC-style product advertisement featuring @actor as MARK, a charismatic creative director with an energetic and quirky personality.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize the persistence of the silver watch on MARK's left wrist. Ensure the background elements (coffee stream, bird, dust) remain perfectly static during the freeze while MARK moves with high energy. Maintain a consistent eyeline toward the lens once the fourth wall is broken.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Style: Retro-Modern Comedy / High-End UGC
- Palette: Saturated mustard yellow, deep teal, and burnt orange
- Lighting: Bright, high-contrast natural daylight with a cinematic glint on the watch face
- Wardrobe: Vintage 70s-style geometric print button-down shirt in teal and orange, mustard corduroy trousers, silver minimalist luxury watch on left wrist
- Environment: A sun-drenched, trendy urban cafe with mid-century modern furniture
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, handheld with a stabilized feel. MARK sits at a cafe table, a barista is mid-pour of a latte in the background. MARK begins to lift his left wrist to check his watch.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, slightly shaky handheld -> [ACT] MARK casually glances at the watch on his left wrist -> [AUDIO] Ambient cafe chatter, clinking cups -> [ENV] Bright sunbeams through a window.
[CAM] CU on MARK's face -> [ACT] As his eyes hit the watch dial, he freezes for a split second before his eyes widen with an energetic spark -> [VFX] Everything in the background instantly locks in place; a stream of coffee hangs in the air like a glass sculpture; a bird is suspended mid-wingbeat outside.
[CAM] MS, pushing in slightly -> [ACT] MARK breaks the fourth wall, leaning toward the camera with an enthusiastic grin while the world remains frozen -> [AUDIO] Ambient sound drops to a pressurized hum -> [VOICE] "You see this? This isn't just a time-piece... it’s a time-control."
[CAM] CU on the watch, angled for maximum drama -> [ACT] MARK brings the watch closer to the lens, his right index finger poised above the crown -> [VFX] A sharp, lens-flare glint bounces off the watch crystal -> [VOICE] "Think this is just a filter?"
[CAM] MCU, centered on MARK -> [ACT] He taps the watch face firmly and winks -> [AUDIO] A sharp, mechanical "CLICK" followed by a sudden rush of ambient sound -> [VFX] The coffee falls into the cup, the bird flies off, the cafe returns to life instantly.
[CAM] MCU -> [ACT] MARK points aggressively but playfully at the lens, leaning back in his chair -> [VOICE] "Wanna see the logic behind the magic? Check out Part 2!" -> [TRANS] Hard cut to black.
[</BRIEF>]

XII. #12

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a high-energy Comedy UGC product showcase featuring @actor as MARK, a charismatic digital creator.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize eyeline-to-lens contact to maintain the UGC "direct address" feel. Ensure the serum bottle remains visible in the left hand while the right hand applies the product. Maintain spatial consistency of the floating "skin peel" VFX as it moves from the face toward the camera-right background.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Style: Retro-modern fusion; crisp 4K UGC texture with cinematic 70s color grading.
Palette: Vibrant mustard yellow, deep teal, and burnt orange.
Lighting: Bright, punchy "Creator" key light with a warm amber backlight for hair separation.
Wardrobe: A vintage geometric-patterned button-down shirt in teal and orange; hair is styled in a loose, textured middle part.
Environment: A brightly lit creative studio with a shelf of vintage cameras and colorful LED accent bars in the background.
Props: A small amber glass serum bottle with a minimalist white label.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, centered. MARK stands in his studio, facing the camera with an energetic, wide-eyed expression. He holds the amber serum bottle in his left hand near his chin, his right hand poised to take the dropper.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, static, slight handheld shake -> [ACT] MARK looks directly into the lens, grinning: "Stop settling for a low-res face." -> [AUDIO] Fast-paced, upbeat synth-pop track starts.
[CAM] CU, PUSH IN slightly -> [ACT] He drops a bead of golden serum onto his right fingertips and begins rubbing it briskly into his right cheek -> [AUDIO] Squish/liquid SFX -> [ENV] A soft golden pulse begins to radiate from his skin where he touches it.
[CAM] MCU -> [ACT] MARK stops rubbing and tilts his head; a translucent, greyish "old skin" layer starts to lift off his cheek like a piece of thin tissue paper -> [VFX] The "old layer" peels away in slow motion, revealing radiant, poreless, glowing skin underneath -> [AUDIO] Ethereal "shimmer" sound effect.
[CAM] CU -> [ACT] The dry skin layer floats past the camera-right side as MARK watches it with a smug, confident smirk. He taps his glowing cheek with two fingers -> [VFX] Subtle golden particles dance around his face -> [AUDIO] Satisfying "ding" chime.
[CAM] MCU -> [ACT] MARK leans closer to the lens, pointing at the camera with his right hand while still holding the bottle in his left: "The secret to this instant upgrade? I'll show you the full breakdown in Part 2. Don't blink." -> [AUDIO] Music swells then cuts abruptly on the final word.
[</BRIEF>]

XIII. #13

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a comedic UGC-style social media video featuring @actor as MARK, an energetic content creator, who reveals a dramatic VFX wing manifestation effect with a playful, enthusiastic hook.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain a continuous, direct-to-camera address to anchor the UGC feel. The VFX wings must evolve seamlessly from his back without spatial disorientation, requiring stable axis and actor orientation. Prioritize readable blocking and motivated camera work that mimics handheld vlogging. Preserve the actor's energetic performance and prop continuity (if any) across rapid cuts.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Style: Vertical UGC social media video, comedic, high-energy
- Lighting: Warm key light on MARK's face from camera-left; dramatic, cooler rim light from behind for the wings; neutral ambient fill.
- Palette: Deep teal and gold for the wardrobe/wings against a warm neutral studio background.
- Wardrobe: Unique vintage piece—a deep teal velvet blazer with subtle gold embroidery over a simple black shirt, suggesting mystical flair.
- Environment: Minimalist studio or loft with soft, blurred background elements (e.g., warm practical lights, dark shelves) to keep focus on MARK and the VFX.
- VFX Mood: Luminous, ethereal, and awe-inspiring but presented with comedic contrast to MARK's casual delivery.
- Core Action: MARK addresses camera, reveals effect, reacts, and delivers a playful cliffhanger.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, handheld, eye-level, camera-right of axis. MARK is framed center, smiling, looking directly into the lens with energetic anticipation. He wears the teal velvet blazer over a black shirt. Background is a softly blurred, warm-toned studio space.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, camera-right of axis -> [ACT] MARK, energetic and smiling, speaks directly to the lens: "Okay, check this out. Something I've been working on." -> [AUDIO] His clear, upbeat voice with faint room tone.
[CAM] QUICK CUT to MS, STILL HANDHELD, slightly lower angle -> [ACT] MARK quickly turns his back to the camera, head slightly bowed. His posture shifts from casual to focused. The back of the teal blazer is prominent. -> [VFX] From his shoulder blades, two massive wings begin to materialize—starting as faint, skeletal energy frames that glow with a golden inner light. -> [AUDIO] A subtle, ascending energy hum begins.
[CAM] ORBIT slowly around to a profile MCU, keeping MARK centered -> [ACT] MARK remains with his back to the initial camera position as the energy frames rapidly fill in with luminous teal and gold feathers, spreading outward. His shoulders tense slightly with the effort. -> [VFX] The wings expand to an enormous wingspan, filling the frame. Luminous feathers and golden energy particles drift downward like slow snow. -> [AUDIO] The energy hum intensifies, layered with a soft, resonant chime.
[CAM] CUT to a dynamic CU on MARK's face, now turning to look over his shoulder toward the camera -> [ACT] MARK turns to face the lens, eyes wide with mock surprise and a thrilled grin. His wings pulse with a final, bright glow behind him. -> [VFX] Wings are at full extension, pulsing gently with light, particles still falling. -> [AUDIO] Energy hum peaks and fades to a soft shimmer.
[CAM] Pull back quickly to a MS, matching the opening angle -> [ACT] MARK faces the camera fully, wings now static but glowing majestically behind him. He gestures with open palms toward the wings. -> [ACT] He delivers the line with cheeky enthusiasm: "So... that's what I can do now. Want to know how? Part two." He winks. -> [AUDIO] His voice is playful over the fading shimmer SFX. No music needed.
[</BRIEF>]

XIV. #14

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a UGC-style comedy teaser for social media, featuring @actor as MARK, a high-energy retro-tech enthusiast and digital artist.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure a seamless jump-cut transition between modern HD and degraded 1980s VHS aesthetics. Prioritize eye-contact with the lens to maintain the "influencer" feel. Track the vintage VHS tape prop in the left hand across the aesthetic shift to maintain spatial continuity.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Style: VHS "Tape Leak" texture, tracking noise.
Lighting: High-key modern ring light switching to harsh, warm, flickering tungsten with heavy bloom.
Palette: Neon teal and magenta modern accents vs. desaturated, yellow-tinted vintage colors.
Wardrobe: A vibrant, oversized 80s geometric pattern windbreaker (purple, teal, and yellow) over a white tee.
Location: A bedroom studio filled with retro monitors, stacked tapes, and a neon "ON AIR" sign.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MCU, MARK stands center-frame in a modern, crisp room. He leans close to the lens with an enthusiastic grin, holding a black VHS tape in his left hand. The lighting is clean and professional.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, fixed tripod -> [ACT] MARK points aggressively at the lens with his right hand while holding the VHS tape up with his left -> [AUDIO] High-energy: "Stop scrolling! You see this vibe?"
[CAM] SNAP ZOOM into the VHS tape -> [ACT] MARK snaps his right fingers in front of the lens -> [VFX] Glitch transition: screen tears and shifts into 4:3 vintage VHS mode with "REC 1987" in the corner.
[CAM] MCU, VHS quality, heavy grain -> [BLOCK] MARK is now wearing aviator glasses, still holding the tape in his left hand -> [ACT] He gestures to the glitchy, flickering environment behind him with a frantic, excited energy.
[CAM] CU, slightly handheld/shaky -> [ACT] MARK brings his face very close to the lens, eyes wide with excitement -> [AUDIO] "We’re tearing the space-time continuum apart with one click!"
[CAM] MCU -> [BLOCK] MARK holds the tape toward the camera as if offering it -> [ACT] He winks and begins to back away from the lens -> [AUDIO] "But the secret to the master glitch? You'll have to wait for Part 2."
[CAM] LOCKOFF -> [ACT] MARK freezes in a dramatic pose, mid-sentence, as the VHS tracking noise aggressively "eats" the frame -> [VFX] Heavy color fringing and tape static until the screen freezes on a distorted frame.
[</BRIEF>]
